languages.text: {n}Куравич замирает и хлопает себя по лбу. {/n}"И правда, ничего лезвия-то!" {n}Он смотрит вам за спину и пронзительно кричит.{/n} "Ясик! Ясик! Ну! Возьми пару человек, попробуйте резаками когтей спилить с тварей этих! Ножей наделаем!"

traits.locale_text: {n}Куравич замирает и хлопает себя по лбу. {/n}"И правда, ничего лезвия-то!" {n}Он смотрит вам за спину и пронзительно кричит.{/n} "Ясик! Ясик! Ну! Возьми пару человек, попробуйте резаками когтей спилить с тварей этих! Ножей наделаем!"

languages.text: {n}Kuravich pauses, then slaps his forehead.{/n} "Not bad at all, those blades!" {n}He looks over your shoulder and screams piercingly.{/n} "Yasik! Yasik! Get a move on! Grab a couple of men and see if you can saw the claws off those beasts with the cutters! We'll have ourselves some knives!"
languages.original_text: {n}Куравич замирает и хлопает себя по лбу. {/n}"И правда, ничего лезвия-то!" {n}Он смотрит вам за спину и пронзительно кричит.{/n} "Ясик! Ясик! Ну! Возьми пару человек, попробуйте резаками когтей спилить с тварей этих! Ножей наделаем!"

traits.locale_text: {n}Kuravich goes still, then brings a hand to his forehead.{/n} "Not bad at all, these blades!" {n}He looks over your shoulder and screams piercingly.{/n} "Yasik! Yasik! Come on! Grab a couple of men and see if you can saw the claws off those beasts with the cutters! We'll have ourselves some knives!"

{n}Kuravich goes still, then brings a hand to his forehead.{/n} "Not bad at all, these blades!" {n}He looks over your shoulder and screams piercingly.{/n} "Yasik! Yasik! Come on! Grab a couple of men and see if you can saw the claws off those beasts with the cutters! We'll have ourselves some knives!"

{n}Kuravich pauses, then slaps his forehead.{/n} "Not bad at all, those blades!" {n}He looks over your shoulder and screams piercingly.{/n} "Yasik! Yasik! Get a move on! Grab a couple of men and see if you can saw the claws off those beasts with the cutters! We'll have ourselves some knives!"

{n}Kuravich pauses, then slaps his forehead.{/n} "Not bad at all, those blades!" {n}He looks over your shoulder and screams piercingly.{/n} "Yasik! Yasik! Get a move on! Grab a couple of men and see if you can saw the claws off those beasts with the cutters! We'll have ourselves some knives!"

languages.text: {n}库拉维奇顿了一下，接着一拍脑门。{/n}“那些刀可真不赖！”{n}他望向你身后，尖声喊道：{/n}“雅西克！雅西克！赶紧的！叫上几个人，看看能不能用切割器把那些畜生的爪子锯下来！咱们就能有自己的刀了！”
languages.original_text: {n}Kuravich pauses, then slaps his forehead.{/n} "Not bad at all, those blades!" {n}He looks over your shoulder and screams piercingly.{/n} "Yasik! Yasik! Get a move on! Grab a couple of men and see if you can saw the claws off those beasts with the cutters! We'll have ourselves some knives!"

traits.locale_text: {n}库拉维奇顿了一下，接着一拍脑门。{/n}“那些刀可真不赖！”{n}他望向你身后，尖声喊道：{/n}“雅西克！雅西克！赶紧的！叫上几个人，看看能不能用切割器把那些畜生的爪子锯下来！咱们就能有自己的刀了！”

languages.text: {n}Kuravich duraksıyor, ardından elini alnına vuruyor.{/n} "Bıçaklar hiç de fena değil!" {n}Omuzlarının üzerinden bakıp çığlık atıyor.{/n} "Yasik! Yasik! Acele et! Yanına birkaç adam al ve o yaratıkların pençelerini kesenlerle çıkarıp çıkaramayacağınıza bir bakın! Bıçak yapacağız!"
languages.original_text: {n}Kuravich pauses, then slaps his forehead.{/n} "Not bad at all, those blades!" {n}He looks over your shoulder and screams piercingly.{/n} "Yasik! Yasik! Get a move on! Grab a couple of men and see if you can saw the claws off those beasts with the cutters! We'll have ourselves some knives!"

traits.locale_text: {n}Kuravich duraksıyor, ardından elini alnına vuruyor.{/n} "Bıçaklar hiç de fena değil!" {n}Omuzlarının üzerinden bakıp çığlık atıyor.{/n} "Yasik! Yasik! Acele et! Yanına birkaç adam al ve o yaratıkların pençelerini kesenlerle çıkarıp çıkaramayacağınıza bir bakın! Bıçak yapacağız!"

languages.text: {n}Kuravich s'interrompt, puis se frappe le front.{/n} « Pour couper, mais bien sûr ! » {n}Il regarde par-dessus votre épaule et interpelle quelqu'un d'une voix perçante.{/n} « Yasik ! Yasik ! Vite, prenez deux ou trois hommes et essayez de voir si vous pouvez scier les griffes de ces bêtes avec les découpeurs ! On s'est peut-être trouvé de nouveaux couteaux ! »
languages.original_text: {n}Kuravich pauses, then slaps his forehead.{/n} "Not bad at all, those blades!" {n}He looks over your shoulder and screams piercingly.{/n} "Yasik! Yasik! Get a move on! Grab a couple of men and see if you can saw the claws off those beasts with the cutters! We'll have ourselves some knives!"

traits.locale_text: {n}Kuravich s'interrompt, puis se frappe le front.{/n} « Pour couper, mais bien sûr ! » {n}Il regarde par-dessus votre épaule et interpelle quelqu'un d'une voix perçante.{/n} « Yasik ! Yasik ! Vite, prenez deux ou trois hommes et essayez de voir si vous pouvez scier les griffes de ces bêtes avec les découpeurs ! On s'est peut-être trouvé de nouveaux couteaux ! »

languages.text: {n}Kuravich hace una pausa y se da un manotazo en la frente.{/n} «¡No son malos esos filos!». {n}Mira por encima de tu hombro y suelta un grito.{/n} «¡Yasik! ¡Yasik! ¡En marcha! ¡Reúna un grupo y mire si puede extraer las garras de esas bestias con las cortadoras! ¡Tenemos cuchillos nuevos!».
languages.original_text: {n}Kuravich pauses, then slaps his forehead.{/n} "Not bad at all, those blades!" {n}He looks over your shoulder and screams piercingly.{/n} "Yasik! Yasik! Get a move on! Grab a couple of men and see if you can saw the claws off those beasts with the cutters! We'll have ourselves some knives!"

traits.locale_text: {n}Kuravich hace una pausa y se da un manotazo en la frente.{/n} «¡No son malos esos filos!». {n}Mira por encima de tu hombro y suelta un grito.{/n} «¡Yasik! ¡Yasik! ¡En marcha! ¡Reúna un grupo y mire si puede extraer las garras de esas bestias con las cortadoras! ¡Tenemos cuchillos nuevos!».

languages.text: {n}Kuravich hält inne und schlägt sich an die Stirn.{/n} "Gar nicht übel diese Klingen!" {n}Er schaut über deine Schulter und stößt einen schrillen Schrei aus.{/n} "Yasik! Yasik! Beweg dich! Schnapp dir ein paar Männer und seht zu, dass ihr diesen Biestern mit den Schneidern die Klauen abschneidet. Wir besorgen uns ein paar Messer!"
languages.original_text: {n}Kuravich pauses, then slaps his forehead.{/n} "Not bad at all, those blades!" {n}He looks over your shoulder and screams piercingly.{/n} "Yasik! Yasik! Get a move on! Grab a couple of men and see if you can saw the claws off those beasts with the cutters! We'll have ourselves some knives!"

traits.locale_text: {n}Kuravich hält inne und schlägt sich an die Stirn.{/n} "Gar nicht übel diese Klingen!" {n}Er schaut über deine Schulter und stößt einen schrillen Schrei aus.{/n} "Yasik! Yasik! Beweg dich! Schnapp dir ein paar Männer und seht zu, dass ihr diesen Biestern mit den Schneidern die Klauen abschneidet. Wir besorgen uns ein paar Messer!"

languages.text: {n}クラビッチはしばらく考え込んだ後、額を叩いた。{/n}「あの刃は悪くないな！」{n}彼はあなたの肩越しに叫んだ。{/n}「ヤシク！ヤシク！急いで！2、3人の男を連れて、あの獣の爪をノコギリで切ってみろ！俺たちはナイフを手に入れるぞ！」
languages.original_text: {n}Kuravich pauses, then slaps his forehead.{/n} "Not bad at all, those blades!" {n}He looks over your shoulder and screams piercingly.{/n} "Yasik! Yasik! Get a move on! Grab a couple of men and see if you can saw the claws off those beasts with the cutters! We'll have ourselves some knives!"

traits.locale_text: {n}クラビッチはしばらく考え込んだ後、額を叩いた。{/n}「あの刃は悪くないな！」{n}彼はあなたの肩越しに叫んだ。{/n}「ヤシク！ヤシク！急いで！2、3人の男を連れて、あの獣の爪をノコギリで切ってみろ！俺たちはナイフを手に入れるぞ！」
